name: dateRange
description: Generates current and comparison date ranges (this week, last week, this month, last month, etc.) using dayjs.
usage_guidelines: Perfect for calculating dashboard analytics time ranges.

params.name: timeRange
params.description: The range pattern for the current period (e.g. 'thisMonth', 'thisQuarter').

params.name: comparisonPeriod
params.description: The range pattern for the previous period (e.g. 'lastMonth', 'lastQuarter').

return_value.type: { current: { start: Date; end: Date }, comparison: { start: Date; end: Date } }
return_value.description: The computed Date objects representing boundaries of the periods.

Do: Use to construct API payloads for timeline charts.
Dont: Avoid manual date math for quarters and months. Rely on this dayjs abstraction.
